content.verdict: Opened in 2019 in a restored neoclassical villa on the quiet Blevio shore, Mandarin Oriental Lago di Como is the polished modern face of Lake Como luxury — 75 keys spread across eight buildings on a steep terraced garden, with the lake-facing infinity pool that appears to spill straight into the water. For honeymooners it pairs Mandarin's signature spa polish with a discreet, almost villa-like layout away from the day-tripper crowds.
content.best_room: Book a Junior Suite with lake terrace in the historic Villa Roccabruna for frescoed ceilings and views of Cernobbio across the lake. The two-bedroom Roccabruna Suite is the marquee option, but for honeymooners the one-bedroom Lake View Suite hits the sweet spot of space and price.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival
itinerary_7_nights.description: Private transfer from Milan or, more dramatically, by speedboat across from Como town. Welcome champagne on your terrace, then a casual first dinner at L'Aria looking out at the lake-spilling infinity pool.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Pool and spa
itinerary_7_nights.description: Spend the morning on the heated lake-edge infinity pool and the afternoon at the signature Mandarin spa for a couple's ritual using local Lake Como botanicals. Aperitivo at the bar, then a tasting menu at L'Aria.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Como town
itinerary_7_nights.description: Take the hotel speedboat to Como — Duomo, walls, and silk shopping at Mantero. Lunch at a lakefront trattoria in the historic center, then back to the pool for a long, slow afternoon.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Bellagio and Varenna ferry day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Boat north to Bellagio for the cobbled Salita streets, lunch with a view, and a ferry hop across to pastel-painted Varenna for gelato on the lakefront. Back in time for sunset cocktails on the Sky Terrace.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Riva Aquarama excursion
itinerary_7_nights.description: Half-day private charter aboard a vintage Riva Aquarama — swim stops in hidden coves, a champagne aperitivo offshore from Villa del Balbianello, and lunch served from a hamper. Quiet evening in for in-suite dining.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Cernobbio gardens day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Visit the gardens of Villa d'Este (with reservation) and Villa Erba, lunch in Cernobbio's piazza, and return for a sunset swim. Final-night dinner at L'Aria with the chef's tasting menu.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell
itinerary_7_nights.description: Slow breakfast in your suite, one more dip in the infinity pool, and a private transfer back to Milan. Optional helicopter add-on lifts you straight off the lake.

caveats: The property climbs a steep hillside with funicular and stair connections — couples with mobility needs should request a building close to reception.
Blevio is residential and quiet at night; nightlife requires a boat ride to Como or Bellagio.
Open seasonally, typically late March to early November.
Some rooms in the back buildings have partial rather than full lake views — confirm category at booking.

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Very. The infinity pool, signature Mandarin spa, lake-facing suites, and quiet shore-side setting away from crowds make it a top-tier honeymoon choice on the lake.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: May-June and September deliver the best mix of warm pool weather, lush gardens, and fewer day-trippers than midsummer.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: Yes — six to nine months ahead for summer suites, longer for the Roccabruna Suite or villa categories.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No, but the property's spread-out villa layout means couples rarely encounter children outside the main pool area.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Junior Suite with terrace in Villa Roccabruna for the historic feel, or a Lake View Suite for more space and modern interiors.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: Fly into Milan Malpensa or Linate; the hotel arranges private car (about 75 minutes) or speedboat from Como town.
